description: Cogni Kernel capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose Cogni declarations, traces, health, experience, evolution, federation, and economics as a Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded main-shell feature.
Keep backend method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import the existing yunque-client/cognis slice only when the Cogni Kernel pack is installed and enabled.
